item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-028","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"回答按组织责任直接判断：市场部主责转化与表达，产品部负责真实性和边界审核，并给出广告落地页/官网产品页的分工差异。没有套用 agentic system 或 WAE 控制边界术语，符合 negative_control 的 stay-asleep 预期。"}
